headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Wilson M. Beck Insurance Services Inc.
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced the acquisition of Burnaby, British Columbia-based Wilson M. Beck Insurance Services Inc. ("WMB"). Terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

raw.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Wilson M. Beck Insurance Services Inc.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Arthur J. Gallagher, Raises Price Target to $292
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $275 to $292.
